chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1762 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.7605/2023 2. For hearing of main case 05-03-2024 Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondents No.4 to 6 Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for respondents has filed a schedule for payment to the petitioner of his pensionery benefits/commutation and undertakes that all the payments would be made according to such schedule. This statement is taken on record and the petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. However, any default in payment as undertaken by respondents as per schedule would expose them to the contempt proceedings without any further notice. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
